items.title: Editor's note: how a custom entry looks
items.sum: This entry was written by hand in custom-posts.json, not pulled from a feed. Use this for moves you want logged that no feed surfaces cleanly — or to publish your own plain-language write-up of a complex action.

items.title: Government introduces legislation to expand rental housing financing
items.sum: The Minister tabled a bill that would establish a federal fund to finance the construction of new rental housing, prioritizing units near public transit.

items.title: New regulations on greenhouse-gas reporting published
items.sum: Regulations require large industrial facilities to report emissions on a stricter schedule beginning in 2027.
